testcase.name: test_get_wishlist

failure.message: AssertionError: Wishlist should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T19:20:57.821703+00:00', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'enterprise_name': 'Unknown', 'id': 'be704ada-ad3d-4709-af75-9b9f9914c4e9', ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features_audit.py:109: in test_get_wishlist assert isinstance(data, list), "Wishlist should be a list" E AssertionError: Wishlist should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T19:20:57.821703+00:00', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'enterprise_name': 'Unknown', 'id': 'be704ada-ad3d-4709-af75-9b9f9914c4e9', ...}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_get_providers

failure.message: AssertionError: Providers should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'providers': [{'category': 'soins_esthetiques', 'city': 'Lausanne', 'created_at': '2026-01-23T19:21:10.619094+00:00', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', ...}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_add_provider
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features_audit.py:181: in test_add_provider assert response.status_code in [200, 201, 400], f"Add provider failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Add provider failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","enterprise_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"enterprise_id":"b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201, 400] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_premium_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Cashback rate mismatch for free: expected 0.01, got 1 assert 1 == 0.01

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features_audit.py:215: in test_get_premium_status assert cashback_rate == expected_rates[plan], f"Cashback rate mismatch for {plan}: expected {expected_rates[plan]}, got {cashback_rate}" E AssertionError: Cashback rate mismatch for free: expected 0.01, got 1 E assert 1 == 0.01

testcase.name: test_premium_cancel
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features_audit.py:248: in test_premium_cancel assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Premium cancel failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Premium cancel failed: {"detail":"Aucun abonnement actif à annuler"} E assert 404 in [200, 400] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_finances

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should have cashback_balance assert 'cashback_balance' in {'recent_cashback': [{'amount': 12.0, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T14:57:05.764201+00:00', 'description': '10% cashback sur commande #a4caf121', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', ...}], 'recent_orders': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T14:57:05.314929+00:00', 'delivery_address': None, 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': 'a4caf121-c2ac-4f40-a77b-908407cd6764', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:56:15.440057+00:00', 'delivery_address': 'Rue de Test 123, 1000 Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': 'ce56334b-9a8a-4752-94dc-6564251c53e4', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:55:21.719942+00:00', 'delivery_address': 'Rue de Test 123, 1000 Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': '387e27ce-46fc-44a7-a5b9-dfd946f4a4ea', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:22:15.267123+00:00', 'delivery_address': '123 Test Street, Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': '194b9925-5075-4efd-92de-cd6764a5f02d', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:18:04.047982+00:00', 'delivery_address': '123 Test Street, Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': '97e8aea8-6ac6-40c7-87ff-61dad8db788e', ...}], 'statistics': {'current_cashback_balance': 85.47, 'orders_count': 8, 'savings_percentage': 1.2, 'total_cashback_earned': 12.0, ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features_audit.py:265: in test_get_finances assert "cashback_balance" in data, "Response should have cashback_balance" E AssertionError: Response should have cashback_balance E assert 'cashback_balance' in {'recent_cashback': [{'amount': 12.0, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T14:57:05.764201+00:00', 'description': '10% cashback sur commande #a4caf121', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', ...}], 'recent_orders': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T14:57:05.314929+00:00', 'delivery_address': None, 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': 'a4caf121-c2ac-4f40-a77b-908407cd6764', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:56:15.440057+00:00', 'delivery_address': 'Rue de Test 123, 1000 Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': 'ce56334b-9a8a-4752-94dc-6564251c53e4', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:55:21.719942+00:00', 'delivery_address': 'Rue de Test 123, 1000 Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': '387e27ce-46fc-44a7-a5b9-dfd946f4a4ea', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:22:15.267123+00:00', 'delivery_address': '123 Test Street, Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': '194b9925-5075-4efd-92de-cd6764a5f02d', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-22T18:18:04.047982+00:00', 'delivery_address': '123 Test Street, Lausanne', 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': '97e8aea8-6ac6-40c7-87ff-61dad8db788e', ...}], 'statistics': {'current_cashback_balance': 85.47, 'orders_count': 8, 'savings_percentage': 1.2, 'total_cashback_earned': 12.0, ...}}

testcase.name: test_cleanup_test_campaigns
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features_audit.py:455: in test_cleanup_test_campaigns if campaign.get('name', '').startswith('TEST_'): ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
